The '''Star Chamber''' was the main chamber of the ancient [[Star Temple]] constructed by the [[Kwa/Legends|Kwa]] c. [[100,000 BBY/Legends|100,000 BBY]]. It was in this chamber that the [[Infinity Gate]] was contained. Inside the Star Chamber was a massive Realm of Infinity, which functioned similar to a pocket dimension. Within the Realm of Infinity was a Stellar Control Station, which maintained the Infinity Gate's power.
